channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Araghchi leading Iranian delegation to Islamabad
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- US sending envoys to Pakistan, raising hopes of talks with Iran’s Araghchi
- Iran says no meeting planned with US; indicates indirect talks through Pakistan
- Trump's envoys Witkoff and Kushner to fly to Pakistan for Iran talks
- Roundup: Iran's FM heads to Islamabad as Pakistan pushes to revive stalled U.S.-Iran talks
- Trump to send envoys Witkoff and Kushner to Pakistan for talks with Iran foreign minister
- US sending envoys to Pakistan, raising hopes of talks with Iran’s Araghchi
- Pakistan bids to revive US-Iran talks
- Direct US-Iran talks in Islamabad to be held on April 27 — Axios reporter
- Iran’s foreign minister arrives in Pakistan, raising hopes for US peace talks
- Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi arrives in Islamabad for talks on reviving ceasefire negotiations
- Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi arrives in Islamabad ahead of US talks
- All Eyes On Islamabad As High-Stakes U.S.-Iran Peace Talks Ramp Up
- Peace talks back on? Trump sending envoys to Pakistan to meet Iran FM; Vance on standby
- Iran's foreign minister heading to Islamabad for indirect talks with US
- US-Iran peace talks to resume? Trump sending delegation to Pakistan as Araghchi announces visit
- Iranian FM Abbas Araghchi to reach Pakistan tonight for talks with U.S.: report
- Iran's Araghchi heads to Islamabad in step towards US talks resumption
- Iranian negotiators will hold talks with Pakistani delegation, but not US envoys
- Iranian delegates expected in Pakistan for peace talks
- US-Iran peace talks could resume; Araqchi to head to Pakistan, say sources
- US Iran peace talks could resume in Pakistan; Iran's foreign minister due, say sources
- Top Iran diplomat set to travel to Pakistan for talks on ceasefire with US
- Iranian Foreign Minister to visit Pakistan, indicating steps towards US talks
- Pakistan expects Iranian top diplomat in Islamabad, breakthrough in US talks: Sources
- Iranian FM Araghchi to visit Pakistan in step towards US talks resumption
- Iran’s foreign minister expected in Pakistan, raising hopes for talks with US
- US Iran peace talks could resume in Pakistan: sources
- Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi set to travel to Pakistan for talks on ceasefire with US
- Iran's foreign minister to head to Islamabad, raising hopes of negotiations with US
- Araghchi to visit Islamabad amid deadlocked US talks
- US-Iran peace talks could resume in Pakistan; Iran's foreign minister due: Sources]]>

- Israel, Lebanon to extend ceasefire as US-Iran talks stall
- Israel, Lebanon extend ceasefire as Iran peace talks stall
